overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's dense urban downtown. The player navigates a canal-side walkway beneath elevated highways, crosses intersections, and moves through neon-lit streets with futuristic architecture and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal-side pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the canal-side sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing parked vehicles on the right

entered.detail: murky green water channel running parallel to the walkway
silver metal railing separating walkway from canal
massive concrete highway structure overhead with red support beams
multi-story buildings with teal and pink neon signage in Japanese script
vertical advertisement showing food items with yellow and purple colors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow canal-side walkway in a cyberpunk city, with a metal guardrail separating the path from murky water on the left and neon-lit buildings on the right. The elevated highway casts partial shadows overhead as the camera moves forward at walking pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal walkway approaching intersection with food vendors

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway, approaching a crosswalk with food vendors and steam vents visible ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: street food cart with steam rising from cooking equipment
yellow striped pedestrian crossing visible at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the canal path, the density of pedestrians increases slightly. A food vendor stall with visible steam appears on the left, and a yellow crosswalk becomes visible ahead as the camera approaches the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: green painted bike and pedestrian path alongside main road

events.description: crossing the yellow striped crosswalk to the other side of the street
transitioning from standard concrete sidewalk to bright green painted pedestrian path

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk then continuing along the green painted pedestrian path, passing a person in a yellow jacket

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket standing with arms crossed facing the street

entered.detail: bright green painted dedicated lane for pedestrians and bicycles
white and orange striped concrete barrier replacing the metal railing
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade showing a face

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk and transitions onto a bright green painted pedestrian path. A concrete barrier with orange stripes now separates the path from the canal, and a large digital billboard becomes visible on the left building as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian path under elevated highway with construction barriers

events.description: entering darker shadow area beneath the overpass with reduced natural light

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded area under the overpass, passing other pedestrians and construction barriers

entered.detail: yellow construction barriers lining the edge of the road

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the elevated highway, the scene becomes significantly darker and more enclosed. The green path continues, now flanked by yellow construction barriers on the right and the concrete barrier on the left, with the large digital billboard now prominent on the left building.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with shops and burning debris

events.description: passing a burning barrel with open flames on the left side of the path
crossing a street intersection with moving traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating past a fire barrel and crossing the street at an intersection, turning slightly right toward the shops

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: metal barrel with open flames burning on the sidewalk
metal scaffolding on building facade with orange safety netting
ground-level storefronts with bright neon signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area, the camera passes a burning barrel with real flames on the left, then crosses a street intersection. The environment opens up to reveal shop fronts with bright neon signage on the right and scaffolding on the left, transitioning back to standard concrete sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a canal-side walkway that transitions from a shadowed urban corridor into a brightly lit pedestrian intersection. It begins on a narrow path beneath an elevated highway, moving between a metal guardrail and neon-lit buildings while the overhead structure casts partial shadows. As the camera advances, the environment becomes more crowded with pedestrians and the scent of steam from a roadside food vendor before a yellow crosswalk appears ahead. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses the intersection onto a bright green painted path, where the metal railing is replaced by an orange-striped concrete barrier. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a large digital billboard on a nearby building as the movement continues forward through the vibrant city street.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, enclosed underpass into a bright, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins by moving deeper beneath an elevated highway, where the environment becomes significantly darker and the green path is tightly flanked by yellow construction barriers and concrete walls. As the camera passes a prominent digital billboard on a nearby building, the scene shifts toward the exit of the covered area. The camera then passes a burning barrel with flickering flames before crossing a street intersection, where the space opens up to reveal a standard concrete sidewalk. Finally, the view expands to showcase bright neon shop signage on the right and industrial scaffolding on the left.
